SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: EXCLUDED_TIER_PRE_ICL

CHAR

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2012. THE CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information 
submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
